Name: Glorious Model O Battery
Author: T3lluz

Actions.Name: Mouse battery
Actions.Tooltip: Large battery readout for Glorious Model O (Segoe UI SVG, compact data URL). Uses bundled Python HID reader.

Description: Live battery percentage with large on-key text and a charging bolt when the mouse reports USB power or charging. Key art uses system UI fonts for reliable Stream Deck rendering; Outfit (OFL) remains in fonts/ for attribution. Heroicons bolt (MIT).
